body:
jellykitsch:

moonblossom:

responsible-reanimation:

Game idea: You play as a humble peasant who must fight off waves of adventurers who feel entitled to just waltz into your house and loot whatever they please.

LET GO OF MY CHEESE WHEEL YOU JERKFACE

Humble Peasant kills adventurers that enter their home

Humble Peasant keeps their weapons, magic items, and hold

Humble Peasant realizes that stronger and stronger adventurers are coming to claim their growing pile of loot

Humble Peasant builds traps and fortifications to keep them out

Humble Peasant procures exotic pets to help defend their home

Humble Peasant continues to amass more and more loot and attract stronger and stronger adventurers

Humble Peasant has to keep building up and fortifying their home, traps, and pets to keep the adventurers out

Humble Peasant suddenly realizes that they have accidentally built a dungeon. It’s a fucking dungeon now. It’s fortified and full of traps, monsters, and treasure, and the Humble Peasant is the boss.

Humble Peasant realizes that adventurers will never leave them alone now.

Humble Peasant hates adventurers.

Humble Peasant accidentally becomes major villain.

Major Villain finds transformation device on adventurer.

Major Villain becomes Hot Sapphic Villainess!

Humble Peasant Women flock to Hot Sapphic Villainess!

Humble Peasant Men get angry at Hot Sapphic Villainess and recruit more heroes!

Hot Sapphic Villainess becomes feared across the land

Hot Sapphic Villainess now commands an army of monster girls

Adventurers keep coming, but mostly because they’re horny

Humble Peasant Women form a devoted cult

Humble Peasant Men form an angry militia

The militia keeps losing because they get turned on by the monster girls

Hot Sapphic Villainess accidentally conquers the kingdom

Hot Sapphic Villainess realizes she has no idea how to run a kingdom

Monster girls offer emotional support

Humble Peasant Women bring baked goods and increasingly elaborate offerings

Adventurers keep showing up but now mostly to flirt and ask for her number

Hot Sapphic Villainess institutes universal healthcare and forced femme enchantments

The kingdom becomes the safest, gayest place in the realm

She finally gets to relax, surrounded by monster girls braiding her hair
